results.title: RingCentral AI Meetings: Smarter Video Collaboration Suite
results.content:
####

RingEX is RingCentral's comprehensive AI-powered unified communications platform, combining calls, texts, video meetings, and faxes in one reliable application. It serves as the foundation for your entire business communications system, combining phone, messaging, SMS, and basic video meetings into a single, integrated workspace.

AI Meetings is a specialized video collaboration suite designed to extend beyond the everyday meeting capabilities included in RingEX. While RingEX focuses on unified communications across multiple channels, AI Meetings provides advanced video solutions for scenarios that demand more sophisticated features and scale.

Key Differences between RingEX and AI Meetings [...] Meetings: Your everyday video collaboration solution for internal team sync-ups, external client calls, brainstorming sessions, and project discussions. Features include AI-generated transcripts, interactive whiteboards, breakout rooms for focused group work, shared notes and action items, and comprehensive screen sharing capabilities—all designed to make daily collaboration seamless and productive. [...] ####

AI Meetings integrates powerful AI capabilities throughout its video collaboration suite to enhance productivity, accessibility, and engagement across all meeting and event types. The platform makes every session productive and inclusive with AI-powered features, including captions, meeting summaries, and content repurposing tools

Core AI features:

Instant Meeting summaries

AI Meetings automatically summarizes key highlights and provides transcripts, video highlights, and playback organized by speaker, ensuring accessibility for all participants and allowing attendees who join late to catch up by reviewing what they missed at the start of the meeting.

Live Transcriptions and Captions

results.title: How AI will Impact Your Business Phone System | CO- by US Chamber of Commerce
results.content:
However, advanced solutions use machine learning and natural language processing to analyze incoming calls. The IVR will instantly connect customers to the right person by looking at previous call histories and behavioral data.

Read more: [4 Effective Ways Small Businesses Can Leverage AI]

## Reimagine work meetings with AI tools

Many modern VoIP platforms offer audio and video conferencing capabilities, allowing remote and onsite teams to connect via internet-connected devices. However, leading hybrid meetings is challenging, so AI-enabled meeting tools greatly help. [...] Indeed, 76% of respondents to an 8x8 survey said “that conversational AI/chatbot capabilities are revolutionizing business communications.” Alternatively, Vonage AI Studio has a low-code option that companies can use to create engaging multichannel experiences.

Incorporating conversational AI tools with your business phone system helps organizations to:

## AI-powered business phone systems increase productivity

Nearly every AI tool can help your staff complete tasks quickly. A few minutes here and there really add up. For instance, Nextiva, RingCentral, and 8x8 use AI to transcribe voicemail to email or text. [...] ## Leverage conversational AI in unified communications

With a unified communications platform, companies can give customers more options to contact them without buying separate subscriptions for voice, video, and messaging services. These systems are ideal for increasing your reach without stretching your budget. LivePerson data showed that “85% of consumers worldwide would like to message with brands,” and 75% report spending more with brands that offer messaging.

Most vendors have unified VoIP systems, including RingCentral, Nextiva, and 8x8. However, managing multiple channels is complicated. AI solutions like 8x8’s intelligent customer assistant add-on and conversational chatbots reduce workloads and improve client engagement.

results.title: Text to Video with AI: Turn Texts into Videos
results.content:
### Generate & Share Your Video

Export your mp4 and share it instantly across your website, social platforms, or learning systems. Choose vertical for TikTok or Instagram reels, or landscape for YouTube.

## Text to Video FAQs

### What is an AI text-to-video generator?

An AI text-to-video generator turns written scripts into polished videos featuring lifelike AI avatars, natural-sounding voiceovers, captions, and visuals. There's no need for cameras, studios, or editing software. With HeyGen, you paste your script, choose from 700+ photorealistic avatars (or create a digital twin of yourself), pick a voice in 175+ languages, and generate a studio-quality video in minutes.

### Can I use my own voice or avatar? [...] ### Accessibility

Create Full Videos from a Single Prompt. No video editing experience required. Simply paste your idea or topic, type a prompt, and the Video Agent acts as your personal director, scripting, storyboarding, and animating a complete video in minutes.

Efficiency

### Efficiency

Automate Scene Creation & B-Roll. Transform blog posts, PDFs, or URLs into engaging text to video narratives instantly. The ai turns your text into scenes, selects relevant B-roll and layouts, and syncs the avatar, getting you 80% of the way to a finished product in one click.

Variety

### Variety [...] ### Refine in AI Studio

Open your draft in AI Studio for granular control. Swap generic B-roll for your own brand assets, adjust script pacing, and polish the layout until it perfectly matches your vision.

### Localize for Global Impact

Scale your reach instantly with Video Translation. Automatically dub your final video into 175+ languages while perfectly preserving your avatar's original voice tone and lip-sync.

results.title: AI-Powered Auto Attendant Phone System for Business
results.content:
This process respects individual time of day, work schedules, and time zones, ensuring callers always connect with the right person at the right moment. The combination of AI automation and human backup creates a resilient, customer-friendly communication stack where AI phone support and live agents work in harmony.

## Why AI + Auto Attendant Is the Future

Modern phone communication demands more than just ringing lines and voicemail inboxes. Businesses need smart systems that route calls instantly, respond naturally, and scale effortlessly with growth. An AI-powered auto attendant phone system isn’t just a convenience, it’s a competitive advantage. [...] ### Efficient Extensions & Ring Groups

Route calls to the appropriate people or teams based on role, location, or call type. AI intelligently selects from extensions, ring groups, or VOA/DID numbers and manages call distribution based on availability, time zones, or priority.

### Robust Spam Blocking

Protect your team from unnecessary distractions with advanced spam detection and call filtering. AI can distinguish between genuine inquiries and robocalls, preventing interruptions and preserving focus.

### Enterprise-Grade Outbound Capabilities [...] ### Try Whippy for Your Team

Experience how fast, automated communication drives growth.
